column1: Review Text

Visited Headmire Salon last week for a keratin treatment and honestly couldn't be happier. My hair used to frizz the moment I stepped outside but now it's smooth and manageable. The stylist explained the process thoroughly before starting. Highly recommend this place in C-Scheme.

Got a balayage done here and the results were stunning. The colorist took time to understand my skin tone before suggesting the shades. The salon has a clean and hygienic setup and the staff is genuinely professional. Will be coming back for my next session.

Tried their hydrafacial for the first time and my skin felt completely refreshed afterwards. No redness or irritation at all. The therapist was gentle and walked me through each step. This is easily the best facial I've had in Jaipur so far.

My bridal makeup was done by the artist here and she absolutely nailed the traditional Rajasthani bridal look I had asked for. Every guest complimented how fresh my skin looked throughout the event. The team is skilled and very calm under pressure.

I came in for an O3+ facial after a recommendation from a friend and I was genuinely impressed. The ambiance is calming and the products they use are top notch. Skin felt deeply cleansed and glowing right after. Will definitely return for another session.

Tried the hair spa services here and it was honestly a relaxing experience. My scalp felt much lighter and my hair had a visible shine afterwards. The head massage they included was the highlight. Great value for the price charged.

Came in for a medifacial in C-Scheme and the results were visible the next morning. Dark spots looked lighter and my skin felt hydrated. The staff was professional and the environment was clean. Definitely going back for the full package they suggested.

Had my engagement makeup done here and it turned out exactly how I had envisioned. The artist listened carefully to what I wanted and added her own touches that made it even better. She used waterproof products so it lasted through all the photos and rituals.

First time getting a dermaroller session in Jaipur and I was a bit nervous but the therapist made me feel comfortable right away. The process was explained in detail. My skin texture has improved noticeably over the past two weeks. Very satisfied.

Got a global hair color done and I'm obsessed with how it turned out. The color is even and vibrant without making my hair feel damaged. The stylist was knowledgeable and suggested a shade that suits my complexion well. Happy customer here.

The men's grooming services here are genuinely good. Got a professional haircut and beard styling in one visit. The barber was attentive and gave me exactly the look I described. Salon is hygienic and the staff doesn't rush you. Will come again.

Visited for an under-eye dark circle treatment and was impressed by how personalized the session was. The therapist assessed my skin before proceeding and used the right products accordingly. After two sessions I can already see a difference. Highly recommend.

Booked a Roka ceremony makeup appointment and the artist arrived on time with all the products ready. The look was elegant and the finish was flawless. She even did a quick touch-up before I stepped out for the ceremony. Very professional approach.

Got nanoplastia hair treatment done here and it has been a complete game changer. Hair is smooth, lightweight and manageable now. The process took a few hours but the results are worth every minute. Excellent service from start to finish.

Tried the nail art studio services in C-Scheme and the nail artist was incredibly creative. Showed her a reference and she replicated it with even better detailing. The manicure was thorough and relaxing too. Great experience overall.

Had an airbrush bridal makeup session for my cousin's wedding shoot and the finish was impeccable. The artist knew exactly which products to use for the outdoor lighting conditions. The makeup lasted beautifully through the entire shoot without any touch-ups needed.

Came here for a hair rebonding treatment and the process was smooth from start to finish. My hair was thoroughly treated at every step and the aftercare advice given was practical and helpful. Results are exactly what I expected and more.

The receptionist was warm and welcoming the moment I walked in. I had booked for a deep conditioning hair treatment and the overall experience was soothing. Hair feels nourished and soft after just one session. Looking forward to coming back.

My first visit here was for an acne treatment facial and I noticed a visible difference in texture after the session. The aesthetician customized the treatment based on my skin concerns. Clean setup, professional staff and a calm atmosphere. Really impressed.

Visited for a pre-wedding shoot makeup and the artist did a brilliant job creating a soft glam makeup look that photographed beautifully. She was patient, detail-oriented and made the session enjoyable. I looked natural yet polished in all the photos.

Got the Olaplex treatment here and my hair feels like it did before I started coloring. The damage is visibly reduced and the shine is back. The stylist was experienced and explained how the treatment bonds broken hair. Well worth the investment.

Tried the bio-hydra facial for the first time and loved how my skin looked after. Fine lines appeared reduced and there was a healthy glow. The aesthetician was gentle and the products smelled amazing. Booked another session for next month already.

Hair extensions were done very neatly and look completely natural. You can't tell they aren't my real hair. The stylist matched the color and texture perfectly. I've been wearing them for weeks and they still look fresh. Excellent workmanship.

Came in for a scalp treatment because of excessive hair fall and the staff assessed my scalp thoroughly before suggesting a plan. The treatment itself was relaxing and I've noticed less hair fall over the past few weeks. Grateful for the expert advice.

The HD party makeup I got done here was absolutely stunning. Perfect for the event theme and the artist ensured the look was long-lasting. She used high-quality products that felt light on my skin. Many guests asked who did my makeup.

Got my eyebrows threaded and tinted here and the technician had a great eye for shape and symmetry. My brows look defined and natural at the same time. This is now my go-to salon for brow work in C-Scheme. Affordable and effective.

Tried the chemical peels treatment and the process was very carefully handled. The therapist did a patch test beforehand and monitored my skin throughout. Within a week my pigmentation had reduced noticeably. Will continue the recommended sessions.

My groom makeup was done here for our wedding day and it looked completely natural yet well-groomed. The artist understood that I wanted a clean, polished look without anything heavy. Really appreciated how he listened and delivered exactly that.

Visited Headmire Salon for a full body polishing session and it was one of the most relaxing experiences I've had. Skin feels incredibly smooth and renewed. The staff maintained complete hygiene throughout. Would recommend this to anyone looking for premium body care.

Got highlights done and the colorist suggested a warm tone that works beautifully with my complexion. The application was precise and my hair looks dimensional and healthy. Switched from my old salon and this one is clearly a step up.

Booked the cocktail party makeup service and the artist nailed the dramatic yet elegant look I described. She worked quickly without compromising on quality. The eyeshadow blending was flawless and the lip color choice was exactly right for the outfit.

Tried the hair smoothening treatment and the frizz that used to bother me daily is completely gone now. Hair takes far less time to style in the mornings. The process was comfortable and the stylist was professional throughout. Very happy with the outcome.

Went in for a skin brightening treatment ahead of a family function and the results were noticeable within a day. Skin looked even-toned and fresh. The aesthetician used gentle products suited for my sensitive skin type. Highly satisfied.

Visited for Rica waxing services and the experience was far less painful than regular waxing. The staff was professional, hygienic and quick without being careless. Skin was smooth with no irritation afterwards. Will definitely be a regular here.

Got my hair cut here for the first time and the stylist listened carefully to what I wanted. The layers were cut exactly right and she styled it beautifully after. Very comfortable experience overall and the pricing is fair for the quality offered.

Tried the oxygen facial and my skin felt absolutely refreshed and plump right after. The salon uses good quality products and the ambiance is peaceful. Great for a mid-week self-care treat. Already planning to go back for the collagen boost facial.

The professional draping service before my event was excellent. The staff was neat, precise and made sure the saree sat perfectly. They even suggested the right blouse pin placement for the outfit. Small but very thoughtful service.

Had a destination wedding makeup consultation here before the event. The artist flew in with us and managed the entire look flawlessly despite the outdoor conditions. Extremely professional, reliable and talented. Couldn't have asked for better service.

Got a deep cleansing cleanup done and my skin looks much clearer and smoother now. The aesthetician identified my skin type correctly and chose the right products. No breakouts after, which I was worried about. Very positive experience.

Tried the hair botox treatment here and my damaged hair has come a long way. The shine and softness after the treatment were immediately visible. The stylist was knowledgeable and explained what the treatment does for hair structure. Really impressed.

Visited for a relaxing body massage and fell asleep halfway through, which is honestly the best sign. The therapist had perfect pressure technique and the ambiance was calm and quiet. Much needed break from a hectic week. Will return for sure.

Got the fruit facial done here and it was a refreshing experience. Skin looked cleaner, brighter and felt soft immediately after. The products smelled naturally fruity without being overpowering. Great option for a quick skin refresh before an event.

My daughter got her hair cut here for the first time and she loved it. The stylist was patient and gentle with kids. The cut was exactly what she had described from a picture. Clean, cheerful environment that's comfortable for children. Nice touch.

First time trying the vampire facial and the therapist was reassuring throughout the process. Explained each step and monitored my comfort level. Post-treatment skin care instructions were clearly given. My skin texture has improved since then.

Tried the anti-aging facial here and noticed reduced fine lines after just two sessions. The therapist used high-quality products and was skilled in facial massage techniques. Ambiance is relaxing and the whole experience feels very premium.

Got a manicure and pedicure done before a big event and both came out beautifully. Nails were shaped neatly and the polish lasted over a week without chipping. The technician was thorough and paid attention to cuticle care too.

Visited for a haldi and mehendi look consultation and the artist had really creative ideas. She suggested a turmeric-infused base prep that made my skin glow for the function. Her attention to detail in the look was impressive and authentic.

The men's haircut here is the cleanest I've gotten in Jaipur. The barber was precise, took his time and suggested a style that suits my face shape. The head wash and massage included were a bonus. My new regular barbershop.

Got the Korean glass skin facial and the results were remarkable. Skin looked dewy, translucent and almost airbrushed. The aesthetician used a multi-step routine and each product was applied with care. Absolutely worth every rupee spent.

Tried the detan pack service before a beach trip and my tan was visibly reduced after one session. The product was effective without causing any dryness. Staff was friendly and the overall experience was comfortable and clean.

My reception makeup was done by one of the senior artists here and it held up through the entire function, including the outdoor photos. The contouring was subtle and the overall look was sophisticated. Truly a professional touch.

Went for a steam bath and spa session here after a long week and it was completely rejuvenating. The facility was spotless and the service was smooth from check-in to wrap-up. Skin felt soft and my body felt lighter after. Excellent value.

Had my outstation bridal makeup done by an artist from Headmire Salon who travelled to the venue. She adapted beautifully to the venue lighting and outdoor conditions. The makeup lasted all day. So relieved to have trusted them for such an important occasion.

Tried the professional nail extensions here and they look genuinely elegant. The technician shaped them perfectly to match my preference and the finish is smooth and durable. No lifting or breakage even after three weeks. Really skilled work.

Got the scalp treatment done and the dandruff issue I had for months has reduced significantly. The therapist recommended a home care routine as well which has been very helpful. Knowledgeable staff and effective treatment plan.

Visited for a celebrity makeup look inspired by a photo I had saved and the artist recreated it almost perfectly while adapting it to my features. The contouring and highlight placement were really well done. Extremely talented team.

Came in for an expert stylist consultation before deciding on a major color change. The stylist evaluated my hair health, discussed my lifestyle and recommended the most suitable treatment. Such a thoughtful and personalized experience. Appreciated.

Got the Roka ceremony makeup done in a simple yet polished style. The artist ensured the look complemented the outfit and didn't overpower it. Made suggestions about jewellery placement too which was helpful. Very considerate professional.

Had my pre-wedding shoot makeup done in a natural glow style and the photographer commented on how well it photographed. Light, fresh finish that didn't look cakey under bright lights. The artist has a great understanding of shoot-ready looks.

Tried the organic facials here and it was a gentle yet effective experience. The products used were plant-based and my sensitive skin had zero reaction. Skin felt clean and balanced after. Great for those who prefer natural skincare options.

Got premium waxing done here and the quality of wax used was noticeably better than what I've had elsewhere. Effective hair removal with minimal irritation. The room was private, clean and the staff was professional throughout. Will switch permanently.

Visited for a root touch-up and the color match was spot on. No visible line between old color and new growth. The stylist was quick without compromising on even application. Affordable pricing for quality service. Very satisfied customer.

Tried the Medifacial here in C-Scheme and my skin looked noticeably brighter after just one session. The aesthetician explained the products being used and their benefits. No irritation or redness post-treatment. Clean and professional setup.

Got a haircut for women here and the stylist understood exactly what I meant by 'minimal trim but add shape'. Hair now has movement and bounce without losing length. Great at listening and translating instructions into actual results.

The blow dry services here are quick, long-lasting and the result is salon-level volume that usually takes me ages to achieve at home. Staff is skilled with different hair types and the products used leave no residue. Brilliant.

Tried the salon membership here and the value is genuinely great. Regular services at discounted rates and priority booking makes life easier. The staff recognizes members and there's a level of personalized service that makes it worthwhile.

Got an ammonia-free hair color done here and was pleasantly surprised by how vivid the results were. Usually compromise with gentler dyes but this was both vibrant and gentle. My scalp didn't feel irritated at all after the session.

Had a full bridal hair styling session done here including the elaborate bun and floral arrangement. Every pin was placed thoughtfully and it held through the entire day. The stylist worked with patience and precision. Absolutely loved the outcome.

The herbal skincare treatments offered here are a lovely option for those who prefer gentle care. My skin responded beautifully to the chamomile-based facial. No inflammation, no redness, just soft and even skin. Will try the full herbal range.

Tried the hair fall treatment here and the combination of the scalp serum and massage has shown real results. Hair loss has reduced over the past month. The therapist gave me dietary advice alongside the treatment plan. Genuinely comprehensive care.

Visited Headmire Salon for my first balayage and the result was natural, sun-kissed and beautiful. The colorist is clearly experienced and passionate about what she does. Zero brassiness and the blending was smooth. Could not be happier.

Got the pigmentation treatment done over two sessions and there is a visible lightening of the patchy areas on my cheeks. The aesthetician set realistic expectations upfront which I appreciated. Good products, professional approach and honest advice.

Had a collagen boost facial session and my skin looked plumper and more youthful right after. The therapist explained how collagen production is stimulated and why consistency matters. Booked a monthly session based on the results alone.

Tried the face polishing services here and my skin felt like velvet afterwards. The exfoliation was thorough without being harsh. Staff maintained excellent hygiene throughout. This is now a regular part of my monthly skincare routine.

Visited for an HD party makeup look for a corporate event and the artist nailed the polished, professional aesthetic I was going for. Subtle, well-blended and long-lasting. Several colleagues asked who did my makeup. That says it all.

Got the bio-hydra facial done and it is genuinely one of the most effective treatments I've experienced. Deep hydration without any heaviness. Skin looked dewy and felt smooth for days after. The therapist was knowledgeable and thorough.

My mehendi look was styled here and the artist suggested a gorgeous half-updo that complemented the traditional outfit perfectly. She also prepped my skin beforehand so the stain appeared deeper. Thoughtful and talented work.

Had a men's grooming session that included a haircut, beard shaping and a basic facial cleanup. Everything was done with care and in a hygienic setup. The barber had great technique and suggested a beard style that suits my face shape perfectly.

Tried the Olaplex treatment here after months of heat damage and the difference is dramatic. Hair feels rehydrated and the breakage has reduced significantly. Worth every penny. The stylist was professional and thorough with the application.

Got a skin rejuvenation therapy session done here ahead of my anniversary and the results were remarkable. Skin looked rested, fresh and even-toned the next morning. The aesthetician was skilled and the experience was thoroughly relaxing.

Visited for a professional consultation about my frizzy hair and the stylist was incredibly honest about what treatments would and wouldn't work for my hair type. That kind of transparency is rare and I really respected it. Booked the recommended session.

Got my bridal look done here for a beach wedding and the artist chose waterproof bridal makeup that lasted through the humid coastal air without budging. Everything from the liner to the lipstick stayed put. Brilliant planning and execution.

The salon's festive deals made it easy to get premium services at accessible prices during the season. Got a full grooming package for myself and my partner and both of us were very pleased with the results. Great way to treat yourself affordably.

Tried the traditional Rajasthani bridal look and the artist was well-versed in the cultural elements. The eye makeup, the maang tikka placement and the overall look were authentic and beautiful. Received so many compliments at the ceremony.

Came in for a hair spa treatment and the therapist customized the massage and serum based on my hair type. Very thorough and relaxing session. My hair absorbed moisture beautifully and the shine lasted for over a week. Impressed.

Got the soft glam makeup done for a family dinner event and it was exactly right - not too heavy, not too bare. The artist listened well and chose shades that complemented my natural complexion. Felt confident and comfortable all evening.

The nail art studio here is one of the better ones I've visited in Jaipur. The artist is creative, patient and precise. Got a floral design on gel nails and they look stunning. Pricing is reasonable for the quality and detail involved.

Had a steam bath session here and the facility was immaculately maintained. Staff were considerate and gave me time to relax without rushing. The experience was genuinely soothing and my skin felt clean and soft afterwards. Lovely addition to any visit.

Visited for an anti-aging facial and the therapist used a combination of massage and targeted serums. Fine lines around my eyes appeared softer. She also gave me practical tips for home care between sessions. Very knowledgeable aesthetician.

Tried the chemical peels treatment for pigmentation and the results have been building up beautifully with each session. Skin texture is smoother and the uneven patches are fading. The therapist monitors progress carefully at each visit.

Got an engagement makeup look done and the artist balanced traditional and contemporary elements brilliantly. The look was photographed and the makeup appeared flawless even under professional lighting. Extremely impressed with the outcome.

Visited for a head massage with hair wash and the experience was pure bliss. The therapist had strong, precise technique and the oils used smelled incredible. Hair felt lightweight and clean after. A service I'll be booking regularly.

Tried the skin brightening treatment before a friend's wedding where I was bridesmaid and my skin looked noticeably glowing in all the photos. Fast, effective and completely comfortable session. Would go back before every big event now.

Had a natural glow makeup session done for a daytime event and the artist understood exactly what I meant. Light base, flush of colour and barely-there liner. Looked effortlessly put-together without appearing overdone. Perfect execution.

Got my hair highlighted here using a technique the colorist recommended based on my hair texture. The result is dimensional, warm and very natural-looking. She also did a bond treatment post-color that kept the shine intact. Brilliant service.

The hygienic salon services here set it apart from many others I've tried. Everything from the tools to the towels are sanitized and the staff wears gloves. Feels genuinely safe and professional. This should be the standard everywhere.

Tried the dermaroller session here for the first time and the therapist walked me through the entire process. Recovery was quick and the skin looked more even-toned and plump within a few days. Will continue with the recommended sessions.

Got the reception makeup done by the senior artist here and it was elegant, long-lasting and beautifully suited to the occasion. The glow on my skin lasted all night. Multiple relatives complimented the makeup and asked for a referral. Very proud.

Visited for a fruit facial and the session was refreshing and light. Perfect for summer. Skin felt clean, soft and hydrated after. The products were gentle and the therapist was careful and professional throughout. Good experience.

Had the Olaplex treatment done after bleaching and the hair feels much healthier. The breakage has reduced and the shine is back. The stylist gave detailed aftercare instructions and even followed up after a week. Great customer service.

Got the men's haircut near me experience here and it was professional and comfortable. Clean tools, skilled barber and a relaxing head wash before the cut. The barber also offered styling tips for the shape I chose. Will recommend to friends.

Tried Headmire Salon's festive salon deals and got a facial and hair treatment combo at a great price. Both services were excellent quality and the staff didn't rush through just because it was discounted. Value for money experience.

Got the traditional Rajasthani bridal look for a cultural ceremony and the artist nailed every detail - the bindi, the kajal, the tikka positioning. The look felt authentic and timeless. Very knowledgeable and skilled artist.

Visited for a Korean glass skin facial and the multiple layers of hydration left my skin looking literally translucent. The therapist spent time on each step and the results were visible immediately. Best facial experience I've had in Jaipur so far.

Tried the men's grooming package here and it covered everything - haircut, beard trim, cleanup facial and manicure. The barber and aesthetician worked smoothly and the session was relaxing. Great value for a full grooming experience.

Got my hair smoothened here before a big event and the results were salon-perfect. Hair was shiny, straight and frizz-free. The stylist also did a blowout afterwards that lasted the entire event. Love how everything came together.

Came in for a scalp treatment for dandruff and the therapist recommended a specific oil-based treatment that suited my scalp type. Three sessions in and my scalp feels much healthier. The advice about diet and shampooing habits was very practical.

Had an airbrush bridal makeup session and the finish was absolutely flawless. The coverage was buildable and the artist adjusted based on the lighting for the event. Photographs beautifully. This is what every bride deserves on her big day.

Got the premium waxing services here and the difference in quality compared to regular wax salons is very clear. Skin is smoother, less red and the results last longer. Hygienic, professional and efficient. Will not go anywhere else now.

The professional staff here made my first facial experience comfortable and enjoyable. The aesthetician explained the benefits of each product and I left feeling confident about my skincare routine. Great first impression of the salon.

Tried the balayage specialist here and she customized the placement of the highlights based on my face shape and hair cut. The result is natural and dimensional. Colors are beautiful without looking too dramatic. Exactly what I asked for.

Visited for a Haldi look and the artist prepped my skin with a glow base and kept the makeup light and glowing, just like I'd imagined. Perfect for the ceremony's vibe. She was also incredibly patient when the function got delayed.

Got the detan pack services done after a mountain trek and my skin tone was noticeably evened out after one session. The product was applied thoroughly and the therapist gave great post-care tips. Really effective and affordable service.

Had a Celebrity makeup artist-level session here for a formal event and the results were absolutely stunning. The contouring and highlight placement were impeccable and the lip colour was perfect. Felt genuinely glamorous all evening.

Visited for my first Hydrafacial in Jaipur and the experience was exceptional. No downtime, immediate results and a visible glow. The suction felt comfortable and the serums smelled lovely. Already scheduled my next monthly session.

Got an expert stylist consultation before switching from straight to wavy hair. The stylist was honest about maintenance and suggested the best approach for my lifestyle. That level of transparency makes me trust them completely.

Had an outstation bridal makeup booking handled here for a Udaipur wedding. The artist was on time, well-prepared and incredibly calm. The look lasted through the palace outdoor ceremonies beautifully. Grateful for such reliable professionals.

Tried the Painless Rica waxing here and the experience lives up to its name. Far more gentle than traditional waxing and the result is smooth without any redness. Hygienic setup and professional technique. My go-to waxing service now.

Visited for hair extensions that I needed for a photo shoot and the stylist matched the texture and color perfectly to my natural hair. The clip-ins were applied neatly and looked completely natural in pictures. Great work for a specific need.

Got the anti-aging facial done by an experienced aesthetician who customized the treatment after evaluating my skin closely. The firming massage and serums used were top-quality. Skin looked lifted and fresher after just one session.

Had a Men's grooming Jaipur experience that was genuinely impressive. Clean setup, skilled barber, quality grooming products and a very comfortable chair. The beard shaping in particular was precise and well-thought-out. Will come again.

Visited Headmire Salon for a Medifacial and the results were visible within 24 hours. Skin felt deeply cleansed and appeared more even-toned. The aesthetician was professional and personalized the treatment based on my skin concerns.

Tried the hair rebonding here and my naturally coarse hair has been transformed. Smooth, sleek and easy to manage. The stylist spent extra time on the ends which needed more attention. Thoughtful, detail-oriented work. Very impressed.

Got a manicure and pedicure before a beach vacation and they were thorough and beautifully done. Nails were shaped, cuticles cleaned and the polish was applied evenly. Lasted the entire trip without chipping. Excellent work.

Came in for groom makeup and the artist understood I wanted to look polished but not made-up. The skin prep and light foundation made me look refreshed and camera-ready without any heaviness. Confidence booster for the wedding day.

Tried the collagen boost facial and my skin felt noticeably more supple and firm after just one session. The therapist explained the role of collagen in skin health which made the process more engaging. Will book these regularly.

Had a soft glam makeup done for a kitty party and the artist chose the most flattering shades for my skin tone. The look was polished, feminine and long-lasting. Got several compliments throughout the evening. Perfect service.

Got the professional nail extensions done here and they are truly beautiful. The technician was skilled and created the almond shape I wanted flawlessly. The gel finish is shiny and chip-free even after weeks. Very talented work.

Visited for a hair cut for women and the stylist gave great suggestions for what would suit my face shape. The cut added so much dimension to my hair. Quick, professional and the blowout after was perfect. Great experience overall.

Tried the oxygen facial here and the immediate glow on my skin after was incredible. The treatment was gentle and the aesthetician used a soothing serum post-procedure. No downtime at all and skin looked bright for days. Lovely service.

Got my Mehendi look styled here and the artist created a gorgeous floral bun with mogra that complemented the yellow outfit perfectly. She worked quickly without compromising on detail. The look was elegant and the photos turned out beautiful.

Had a head massage with hair wash session and it was one of the most relaxing 45 minutes I've had in a while. The therapist has excellent pressure technique and the hair wash was thorough without being rough. Hair smelled amazing after.

Tried the deep conditioning hair treatment here and my dry, brittle hair has responded really well. Strands feel smoother, more elastic and the breakage has clearly reduced. The stylist used a heat cap during the treatment which enhanced absorption.

Got an eyebrow threading and tinting session done here. The arch created suits my face shape and the tint has defined the brows beautifully without looking unnatural. Quick, precise and affordable. My new regular spot for brow care.

Visited for a PRP skin session and the therapist was skilled and reassuring. She explained the healing process clearly and provided a detailed aftercare plan. Skin has shown gradual improvement and looks more youthful. Glad I tried it.

Got the hair highlights done with a warm caramel tone and they suit me perfectly. The colorist took care to protect my hair during the process and used a conditioning treatment post-color. Overall a very thorough and professional experience.

Had a soft glam makeup done for a daytime wedding and it was light, glowy and perfect for the sunny outdoor setting. The artist understood the vibe immediately and worked with precision. Felt comfortable and confident through the entire event.

Tried the glow facial for weddings here a week before my big day and my skin was in the best condition I've seen it in years. The therapist planned the session perfectly in terms of timing. Absolutely recommend for all brides.

Got a professional haircut here and the stylist shaped my hair in a way that's easy to maintain at home. She showed me how to blow-dry it correctly for the best volume. That extra effort is what makes this salon stand out for me.

Visited for face polishing services and the exfoliation left my skin feeling like new. The product used was mild but very effective. The therapist was thorough and attentive. Great prep for an upcoming event. Will book again next month.

Had the traditional Rajasthani bridal look done for our sangeet function and it was breath-taking. The layered eye look, the structured hair and the dupatta draping all came together beautifully. The artist truly understands this style.

Got a Keratin treatment done here and my hair is now the most manageable it has ever been. Style time in the morning has halved. The stylist was thorough and the product quality was excellent. Great value for such a transformative result.

Tried the herbal skincare treatments here for the first time and loved the gentle yet effective approach. The rose and aloe-based facial was deeply soothing. Zero irritation and my skin looked calm and bright after. Perfect for sensitive skin.

Had a cocktail party makeup session done here and the look was bold yet sophisticated. The smoky eye was perfectly blended and the overall makeup lasted through dancing and dinner. Several compliments throughout the night. Excellent artist.

Got a Hydrafacial done before a big event and my skin looked like it had been filtered in real life. Pores appeared minimized and the glow was real and lasting. The therapist was professional and made the session very comfortable.

Visited for a full body polishing service and the experience was luxurious. The scrub used was fragrant and effective and the therapist was thorough. Skin looked and felt completely renewed. One of the better spa services in Jaipur.

Had the engagement makeup look done and the artist suggested a beautiful layered eyeshadow combination that I wouldn't have thought of myself. It suited the ring ceremony perfectly and made my eyes pop in all the photos. So grateful.

Tried the salon membership offers here and the convenience is unmatched. Never have to wait long, get priority scheduling and the staff knows my preferences by now. Personalized experience with great savings. Highly recommend the membership.

Got a nude makeup specialist session here for a business event and the finish was immaculate. The makeup was barely-there but looked polished and professional. The artist understood the brief immediately. Perfect for corporate occasions.

Visited for a reception makeup appointment and the look was refined and elegant. Artist used full-coverage products that still looked natural in person. Skin prep before the application was thorough and the longevity was excellent.

Had a destination wedding makeup consultation and the artist was organized, prepared and had a detailed plan for the event conditions. She executed the look perfectly despite the outdoor setting. Really impressed by the level of professionalism.

Tried the professional draping services here for a saree event and the drape was perfect - neat, structured and elegant. The staff adjusted the pleats beautifully and pinned everything securely. Saved me from the usual last-minute draping panic.

Got a Vampire facial done here and the therapist made the process very manageable. The healing was faster than expected and skin texture improved noticeably. She monitored my comfort throughout and the aftercare guidance was detailed.

Visited for a global hair color and the colorist suggested a rich burgundy that I had been hesitant to try. She convinced me and I am so glad she did. Color is vibrant, even and my hair still feels healthy. Expert guidance makes a difference.

Tried the hair botox treatment after extensive heat styling damage and the results exceeded my expectations. Hair is smooth, shiny and feels significantly stronger. The stylist applied the product evenly and the session was comfortable throughout.

Had a bridal hair styling session done here the morning of the wedding and everything held beautifully through the ceremony and reception. The artist factored in humidity and outdoor conditions while choosing the style. Very thoughtful planning.

Got the detan pack services here before a summer event and the tan reduction after one session was visible. The product is effective and the therapist is thorough. No dryness or irritation after. Quick and effective service for sun-damaged skin.

Visited for an under-eye dark circle treatment and the therapist used a combination of targeted serums and a light massage technique. The area looks noticeably brighter after a few sessions. Consistent improvement and great professional advice.

Got the bio-hydra facial done here and my skin felt quenched and calm immediately after. No redness or sensitivity. The therapist used good quality products and worked with a very gentle touch. Skin stayed glowing for several days. Loved it.

Had a skin rejuvenation therapy session here and walked out looking visibly rested and refreshed. The therapist customized the treatment based on my lifestyle and stress indicators. Felt like a reset for my skin. Will definitely return monthly.

Tried the O3+ facial here and the product range is impressive. Each step of the facial was clearly explained and the massage was deeply relaxing. Skin looked clean, bright and even after. Value for money and a very calming experience.

Got the smoothening treatment done here and my hair is completely tamed now. No frizz even in humid weather. The process was comfortable and the stylist applied the product very evenly. Best decision for my hair type. Highly recommended.

Visited for a makeup for special occasions session for a cultural event and the artist understood the brief well. The look was vibrant but appropriate for a traditional setting. Makeup lasted the entire day without needing any touch-ups.
